description_long: This is a soft, plush stuffed toy designed to resemble a sock monkey, featuring a light gray, textured fabric body with a white face and ear accents. The toy has a rounded head with two circular ears, black stitched eyes, and a simple stitched black mouth, giving it a friendly and approachable appearance. Its arms and legs are elongated and flexible, with distinctive red, white, and gray striped patterns at the hands and feet, mimicking the look of classic sock monkeys. The body is plump and slightly rounded, suggesting it is filled with a soft, lightweight stuffing. The toy sits with its legs extended forward and arms slightly out to the sides, resting on a flat base. The overall appearance is inviting and playful, making it suitable for children or as a decorative item in urban environments such as parks or playgrounds.
description: A plush sock monkey stuffed toy with a gray textured body, white face, and red-striped limbs, sitting with arms and legs extended. Its friendly stitched face and soft, flexible limbs give it a classic, playful look.
description_view_0: The left side of the sock monkey is visible, showing the profile of its head, ear, and the striped left arm and leg extended forward.
description_view_1: The back of the toy is shown, highlighting the rounded gray body, both ears, and the striped limbs extending outward from behind.
description_view_2: The right side of the sock monkey is visible, displaying the profile of its face, ear, and the right arm and leg with their red and gray stripes.
description_view_3: The front of the toy is shown, clearly displaying the white face, stitched eyes and mouth, both ears, and the striped arms and legs extended forward.
attribute_facial_expression: The facial expression is friendly and neutral, with black stitched eyes and a simple stitched black mouth that gives a gentle, approachable look. There are no eyebrows or other expressive features.
attribute_pose_or_posture: Sitting upright with both arms slightly out to the sides and both legs extended forward. The head is upright and facing forward.
